title: Outdated bug reporting instructions
body:
### Issue Description

> Before reporting an issue, please verify the version you are running with podman version and compare it to the latest release documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](https://github.com/containers/podman#readme). If they differ, please update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating an issue.

The current readme doesn't have versions.


### Steps to reproduce the issue

n/a


### Describe the results you received

n/a


### Describe the results you expected

n/a


### podman info output

```yaml
n/a
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body: The version badge seems to be working fine for me, is it broken for you by any chance? > please verify the version you are running with podman version Though I agree the phrasing here is a bit awkward.
@holmanb Are you interested in opening a PR?
If @holmanb isn't interested or doesn't have the time, I'd be happy to open a PR for this.
